input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an API drift/constructor-signature compile issue in tests, not missing setup; generated tests must compile against the exact 2.0.7 resolved artifact and transitive maven-artifact APIs.

Tests that invoke real Maven build execution may touch user.dir, settings/local repository, or network-facing resolver paths; prefer isolated temporary projects and non-networking CLI/help/version or component-level coverage unless local Gradle/native-image verification proves more setup is needed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its Maven/Plexus/ClassWorlds dependencies from its POM, and meaningful coverage is reachable through core APIs, diagnostics, runtime-info, lifecycle, and CLI version/help paths without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or mandatory environment/system properties.
